title: DUNLOP Dbl Foot Pump
features: VERSATILE FOOT PUMP FOR CAR AND BIKE - This Dunlop foot pump is ideal as a bike pump and car tyre pump, perfect for inflating air mattresses, pools, and more.
COMPACT DUNLOP BIKE PUMP WITH PRESSURE GAUGE - This foot pump is lightweight and portable, making it easy to carry the foot pump for inflating bike tyres and car tyres on the go.
PRECISE FOOT PUMP WITH PRESSURE GAUGE - With the built-in pressure gauge, you can accurately read and regulate the pressure with this foot pump, ideal for any use.
DURABLE FOOT PUMP FOR AIR MATTRESSES AND POOLS - The Dunlop foot pump is designed for long-lasting use, perfect as a foot pump for air mattresses and pools.
EASY TO USE BIKE PUMP AND FOOT PUMP - This Dunlop bike pump and foot pump for car tyres requires minimal effort and is easy to operate, ideal for use at home or on the go.
description: The Dunlop foot pump is a reliable and efficient way to inflate the tires of your bike, motorcycle, or car. This foot pump is designed for versatile use and is compatible with various valves, making it an essential accessory for every cyclist or motorist. With its sturdy construction and easy-to-read pressure gauge, this foot pump offers precision and convenience when inflating tires. The foot pump is compact and lightweight, making it easy to transport and store. Ideal for use at home, in the garage, or on the go. Specifications Brand: Dunlop Type: Foot Pump Compatible with: Car, bike, motorcycle Pressure Gauge: Yes Material: Steel and plastic Color: Black Weight: approx. 1.5 kg
